title: profile-to-permset-migrator inputs
description: Typed inputs for the profile-to-permset-migrator runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

profile_name.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Sales User` Required column: 'yes (unless `profile_name_filter` is set)'.

profile_name_filter.description: Example from AGENT.md: `Custom:*` — handle a batch of profiles matching a wildcard Required column: 'alt'.

reuse_psg.description: Example from AGENT.md: name of an existing PSG to extend rather than create; if unset, the agent proposes a new PSG Required column: 'no'.
reuse_psg.example: name of an existing PSG to extend rather than create; if unset, the agent proposes a new PSG

minimum_access_shape.description: Example from AGENT.md: `standard-user` (default) | `minimum-access` (leaner residue) | `custom-residue` — guides how aggressive the stripping is Required column: 'no'.

integration_mode.description: Example from AGENT.md: `true` if the profile is an integration user profile; changes the decomposition (no PSG, single dedicated PS) Required column: 'no'.
